underlying_goal: Fix the onboarding character selection to show all 3 character templates (小柔/Aria/Mochi) instead of just one, and ensure they are properly created as card entries
friction_detail: Created a new constants file that Vite couldn't resolve without a dev server restart, had to move the templates into an existing file instead.
brief_summary: User reported only 1 character template showing instead of 3; Claude diagnosed the issue, created 3 character templates in the card store, and verified the fix in the browser.
